'''shayubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deacetylase|deacetylase]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-y-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deacetylase|deacetylase]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shayubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæyibith|shæyibith]] || [[word:shæyibij|shæyibij]] || [[word:shæyibish|shæyibish]] || [[word:shæyibi|shæyibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shayuyubuth|shayuyubuth]] || [[word:shayuyubuj|shayuyubuj]] || [[word:shayuyubush|shayuyubush]] || [[word:shayuyubu|shayuyubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shayubuth|shayubuth]] || [[word:shayubuj|shayubuj]] || [[word:shayubush|shayubush]] || [[word:shayubu|shayubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shayufbuth|shayufbuth]] || [[word:shayufbuj|shayufbuj]] || [[word:shayufbush|shayufbush]] || [[word:shayufbuf|shayufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shayubuthu|shayubuthu]] || [[word:shayubuju|shayubuju]] || [[word:shayubushu|shayubushu]] || [[word:shayubuku|shayubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shayubuth|shayubuth]] || [[word:shayubuj|shayubuj]] || [[word:shayubush|shayubush]] || [[word:shayubu|shayubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shayubuthul|shayubuthul]] || [[word:shayubujul|shayubujul]] || [[word:shayubushul|shayubushul]] || [[word:shayubukul|shayubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shayubuthuthu|shayubuthuthu]] || [[word:shayubujuju|shayubujuju]] || [[word:shayubushushu|shayubushushu]] || [[word:shayubuku|shayubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shayubuthun|shayubuthun]] || [[word:shayubujun|shayubujun]] || [[word:shayubushun|shayubushun]] || [[word:shayubukun|shayubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shayubuthuoro|shayubuthuoro]] || [[word:shayubujuoro|shayubujuoro]] || [[word:shayubushuoro|shayubushuoro]] || [[word:shayubukuoro|shayubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
